title: Kevin Kindall
compiled_truth: Kevin Kindall is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-13 to 2001-05-18), Kevin Kindall sent 28 and received 125 emails, totalling 153 interactions.
